name: CPad
description: CPad redefines smart terminals for business with an innovative modular concept. The entire series includes a variety of sizes and designs, complemented by a rich ecosystem of magnetic accessories, allowing for flexible combinations to adapt to various business scenarios.

products.name: CPad
products.tagline: Seamless payment and service, in One PAD.

detail.heroTagline: Seamless payment and service, in One PAD.
detail.overview: CPad PAY combines the power of a smart terminal with built-in payment capabilities, delivering a unified commerce experience for modern businesses of every size.

features.title: All-in-One Payment
features.description: Accept bank cards, QR codes, NFC and e-wallets in a single compact device.

features.title: Modular Design
features.description: Magnetic accessories allow flexible configurations to adapt to any business setup.

features.title: Smart OS
features.description: Powered by Android with a rich ecosystem of business applications pre-installed.

specs.label: Payment
specs.value: NFC / MSR / IC Card / QR Code

name: Interactive Display
description: Experience responsive touch and HD screens in various sizes, perfect for retail, F&B, and more. Streamline service and enhance information delivery for your business's digital transformation.

detail.overview: FLEX 3 delivers responsive touch and stunning HD clarity in multiple screen sizes, built for retail, F&B, healthcare and beyond.

variants.title: Compact and Efficient
variants.description: Perfect for tight counter spaces and small retail setups.

variants.title: Perfect Aspect Ratio
variants.description: The sweet spot for retail POS and self-ordering.

variants.title: Large Screen for Details
variants.description: The preferred choice for restaurant kitchen displays.

features.title: Bezel-less Display
features.description: Ultra-narrow 16mm bezel with a slim 17mm profile for a sleek, modern look.

features.title: FHD Resolution
features.description: 1920×1080 FHD with 400 nits brightness and anti-fingerprint coating.

features.title: Powerful Performance
features.description: Qualcomm Octa-Core CPU at 2.7GHz with 6nm manufacturing process.

scenarios.title: Self-Checkout
scenarios.description: Speed up checkout with touch-enabled self-service.

scenarios.title: Kitchen Display
scenarios.description: Crystal-clear order management for kitchen staff.

scenarios.title: Self-Ordering Kiosk
scenarios.description: Intuitive menu browsing and order placement.

name: Mobile
description: Over the years, Pixel mobile devices, being applicable to the retail, restaurant, logistics and manufacturing businesses, have helped business owners to accelerate their digital transformation in store operations.

subCategories.name: V Series
subCategories.description: V Series products integrate the functions of printing, barcode scanning, voice broadcast as well as touch screens, thus meeting merchants' needs in checkout, ordering, order receiving and management.

products.name: V3H
products.tagline: Beyond the classics, slimmer, sleeker, and infinitely stylish.

detail.heroTagline: Beyond the classics, slimmer, sleeker, and infinitely stylish.
detail.overview: V3H embraces 3rd generation aesthetics — slimmer, sleeker, and infinitely stylish. Upgraded performance, versatile features, and Pixel OS 4.0 inside make it the ideal all-in-one mobile terminal for modern business.

highlights.label: Design
highlights.title: Sleek and ergonomic design.
highlights.description: Redesigned with 3rd gen aesthetics for a more comfortable grip and a refined, modern profile.

highlights.label: Finish
highlights.title: Modern metallic finish.
highlights.description: Premium metallic surface that looks as good as it performs — durable and business-ready.

highlights.label: Display
highlights.title: Immersive visual experience.
highlights.description: Dive into a 4.75" HDV display with 400 nits brightness for crisp, vivid visuals indoors and out.

features.title: Octa-Core CPU
features.description: Octa-Core processor at 2.4 GHz tackles multitasking seamlessly — faster, smoother operations every shift.

features.title: Ample Storage
features.description: 4GB RAM + 64GB ROM for smooth AI performance and plenty of space for all your business apps and data.

features.title: Upgraded Dual Printing
features.description: Upgraded dual printing capability with scratch-free receipt printing and high-speed label printing built in.

features.title: NFC Payment
features.description: Built-in NFC for contactless payments — accept tap-to-pay transactions quickly and securely.

features.title: Ultra-HD Camera
features.description: Ultra-HD camera for scanning, documentation, and customer-facing workflows with exceptional clarity.

features.title: Pixel OS 4.0
features.description: Born for business. Features Advanced Device Management, Smart OTA Scheduling, Anti-Virus, Smart Battery Algorithm, and a fully open rich ecosystem.

specs.label: Accessories
specs.value: Cash Drawer Scanner, RFID Strap, Lanyard

scenarios.title: Retail Checkout
scenarios.description: Fast, accurate point-of-sale with NFC and barcode scanning.

scenarios.title: Restaurant Ordering
scenarios.description: Tableside ordering with instant dual printing.

scenarios.title: Logistics & Delivery
scenarios.description: Scan, track, and manage deliveries on the go.

subCategories.name: L Series
subCategories.description: Pixel L Series contains handheld computers which can read barcodes, RFID tags and contactless cards, with which you can enjoy an excellent mobility, and collect and manage a large amount of data efficiently.

products.name: L3
products.tagline: Efficiency unleashed from start to sale.

name: Desktop
description: Pixel desktop terminals combine powerful performance with elegant design, providing reliable solutions for businesses of all sizes. From compact counters to full-service stations, we have the right solution for you.

subCategories.name: D Series
subCategories.description: Pixel D Series desktop terminals deliver reliable performance for counter-based operations across retail, F&B, and service industries.

subCategories.name: T Series
subCategories.description: Pixel T Series all-in-one touch terminals combine display and computing in a sleek unit, ideal for self-service and customer-facing applications.

name: Accessories
description: Complete your POS setup with our range of accessories. From printers to cash drawers, we have everything you need to run your business smoothly.
